label: Chronometric Age Uncertainty In Years
rdfs_comment: The temporal uncertainty of the chrono:earliestChronometricAge and chrono:latestChronometricAge in years.
dcterms_description: The expected unit for this field is years. The value in this field is number of years before and after the values given in the chrono:earliestChronometricAge and chrono:latestChronometricAge fields within which the actual values are estimated to be.
